title: TradingNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-trading-server-rs (signals -> decisions -> order intents).

subjects.name: TradingSignals
subjects.description: Inbound market signals consumed by the trading server. Default for TRADING_SIGNAL_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.trading.signals

subjects.name: TradingDecisions
subjects.description: Risk-gated buy/sell/hold decisions emitted by the trading server. Default for TRADING_DECISION_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.trading.decisions

subjects.name: TradingOrderIntents
subjects.description: Concrete order intents derived from decisions. Default for TRADING_ORDER_INTENT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.trading.order_intents
